subcodes.first_line: Thy mention hath been made in the Most Great Prison, and the glances of divine favor have been directed towards them that seek the Ka'bah of their heart's desire. Every soul today [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکرت در سجن اعظم مذکور و لحاظ عنایت الهی متوجه بقاصدان کعبه مقصود بوده هر نفسی الیوم
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @thankfulness; gratitude
